creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
Update www/pelican to 3.3.0. Note that ports/185102 must be processed first because it provides a newer version of a required dependency. While here, make a few more changes:

 - Update COMMENT and pkg-descr
 - Rename TESTS option to TEST, the standard name
 - Enable STAGE support
 - Automatically generate a pkg-plist using easy_install

Fix: Apply the attached patch. Please use `svn patch`, or something funny might happen.

Patch attached with submission follows:
